author: Sylvester Mazzolini
title: Tractatus de expositione missae sive de immolatione spiritalis agni et sacrificio novae legis
remarks: https://www.digitale-sammlungen.de/de/view/bsb10164330?q=%28de+expositione+missae%29&page=4,5. Possibly one of his first works, published just before an exposition of the Gospels of the year, while Vicar General in Lombardy. Not a first, but an early work (see German wiki page). Mazzolini also takes into account the Milanese rite!
